title: Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India:
Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Tour Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India!
